question: 列出前三位艺人的名字
expected_sql: SELECT name FROM artist ORDER BY artist_id LIMIT 3

question: 数据库里一共有多少张专辑？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM album

question: 每种曲风下有多少首曲目？按数量降序
expected_sql: SELECT g.name AS genre, COUNT(*) AS track_count FROM track t JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id GROUP BY g.name ORDER BY track_count DESC

question: 数据库里一共有多少个客户？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM customer

question: 列出所有不同的开票国家，按字母升序
expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT billing_country FROM invoice ORDER BY billing_country

question: 单价最贵的 5 首曲目（返回曲名和单价）
expected_sql: SELECT name, unit_price FROM track ORDER BY unit_price DESC, track_id LIMIT 5

question: 销售总额排名前 5 的国家
expected_sql: SELECT billing_country, SUM(total) AS revenue FROM invoice GROUP BY billing_country ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: 下过至少 7 次订单的客户有哪些？返回客户 ID、姓、名
expected_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.last_name, c.first_name FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.last_name, c.first_name HAVING COUNT(i.invoice_id) >= 7

question: 最畅销的 5 首曲目（按购买总数量排行），返回曲目名和销量
expected_sql: SELECT t.name AS track, SUM(il.quantity) AS units FROM track t JOIN invoice_line il ON t.track_id = il.track_id GROUP BY t.track_id, t.name ORDER BY units DESC, t.name LIMIT 5

question: 收录曲目超过 15 首的专辑，按曲目数降序
expected_sql: SELECT a.title, COUNT(t.track_id) AS track_count FROM album a JOIN track t ON a.album_id = t.album_id GROUP BY a.album_id, a.title HAVING COUNT(t.track_id) > 15 ORDER BY track_count DESC, a.title

question: 每个员工支持多少个客户？按客户数降序
expected_sql: SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customers FROM employee e LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.support_rep_id = e.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY customers DESC, e.last_name

question: 累计消费最多的前 10 名客户
expected_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, SUM(i.total) AS spent FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name ORDER BY spent DESC, c.customer_id LIMIT 10

question: 2023 年的订单总额是多少？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_2023 FROM invoice WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM invoice_date) = 2023

question: 从未被购买过的曲目，按曲名排序返回前 10 首
expected_sql: SELECT t.name FROM track t LEFT JOIN invoice_line il ON t.track_id = il.track_id WHERE il.invoice_line_id IS NULL ORDER BY t.name LIMIT 10

question: 每种曲风的平均曲目时长（毫秒），按时长降序
expected_sql: SELECT g.name AS genre, AVG(t.milliseconds) AS avg_ms FROM genre g JOIN track t ON g.genre_id = t.genre_id GROUP BY g.name ORDER BY avg_ms DESC

question: 每个国家累计消费最多的客户是谁？
expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (c.country) c.country, c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, SUM(i.total) AS spent FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id GROUP BY c.country, c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name ORDER BY c.country, spent DESC

question: 列出所有员工及其直属经理的名字（没有经理的经理字段显示 NULL）
expected_sql: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee, m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS manager FROM employee e LEFT JOIN employee m ON e.reports_to = m.employee_id ORDER BY employee

question: 购买过 Rock 曲风曲目的客户里，Rock 类消费最高的前 5 位
expected_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) AS rock_spend FROM customer c JOIN invoice i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id JOIN invoice_line il ON i.invoice_id = il.invoice_id JOIN track t ON il.track_id = t.track_id JOIN genre g ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE g.name = 'Rock' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name ORDER BY rock_spend DESC, c.customer_id LIMIT 5

question: 按销售额排名前 10 的艺人（经过 artist→album→track→invoice_line 链路）
expected_sql: SELECT ar.artist_id, ar.name, SUM(il.unit_price * il.quantity) AS revenue FROM artist ar JOIN album al ON al.artist_id = ar.artist_id JOIN track t ON t.album_id = al.album_id JOIN invoice_line il ON il.track_id = t.track_id GROUP BY ar.artist_id, ar.name ORDER BY revenue DESC, ar.artist_id LIMIT 10

question: 每种曲风里销量最高的曲目（销量 = 购买总数量）
expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (g.genre_id) g.name AS genre, t.name AS track, SUM(il.quantity) AS units FROM genre g JOIN track t ON t.genre_id = g.genre_id JOIN invoice_line il ON il.track_id = t.track_id GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.name, t.track_id, t.name ORDER BY g.genre_id, units DESC, t.name
